positive: A whimsical, mid-century modern illustration of a picnic basket set amongst stylized vintage picnic blankets and checkered tablecloths. The scene features anthropomorphic garden elements like smiling sunflowers and striped butterflies. Linocut print style, limited color palette (mustard yellow, burnt orange, teal), retro aesthetic, flat composition.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, grunge, messy, complex shadows
